key_evidence: OCHA Sit. Update 294: 59% (44 of 75) of planned aid movements denied outright through Israel-authorized Jordan/Allenby corridor (May 28-June 3 window)
May 28 As Saftawi strike: 9 members of one family killed including journalist's family; 15 injured
May 29 Al Bureij refugee camp strike: 23+ Palestinians killed including children; 8 residential buildings destroyed; 2 follow-on deaths
2,700+ children under 5 diagnosed with acute malnutrition in second half of May per OCHA Nutrition Cluster
HRW May 19: 'Gaza: Israel Curbs Aid, Kills Civilians During Ceasefire' — institutional documentation of post-ceasefire pattern
methodology_note: Floor entity at 0; composite cannot move below floor. New conduct sub-category documented: nominal corridor authorization paired with 59% denial-in-execution rate is structurally distinct from prior wartime-access-denial and ceasefire-period-aid-restriction arcs. Methodology record only.
